description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a hooded sweatshirt with a prominent hood, slim-fit pants, and athletic sneakers. The figure has a slim build, elongated limbs, and a slightly exaggerated head with defined facial features, including a short beard and mustache. He wears a beanie hat that fits snugly over his head, and his hands are relaxed at his sides. The hoodie has a drawstring and a front pocket, adding to the casual streetwear look. The shoes are detailed with laces and textured soles, and the pants are fitted, ending just above the shoes. The overall appearance suggests a young adult commonly seen in city environments, such as sidewalks, parks, or public transit areas.
description: A stylized adult male in casual streetwear, including a hooded sweatshirt, slim pants, sneakers, and a beanie hat. The figure has a slim build and relaxed posture, suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and front details of the hoodie, pants, and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the beanie's shape, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, hood, shoulders, and the back of the pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and side details of the outfit and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt, slim-fit pants, beanie hat, and athletic sneakers
